since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.77% · BTC +0.40% · Gold +1.32% · Nasdaq100 +1.52%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.64%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.16%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.03%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.03%, ANET +7.98%, AMD +7.73%, S +7.62%, INOD +7.19%. Laggards: AVAV -5.10%, UPST -1.75%, INTU -1.65%, SNAP -1.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.46% at $161.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
